evals.prompt: Turn this selected Figma CRM table view into a React implementation plan using our existing components.
evals.expected_output: Maps Figma elements to local components, routes to webapp-ui-skill, and requires local visual/state validation.

evals.prompt: We have Code Connect for buttons but not for cards. Make a handoff for this product page.
evals.expected_output: Uses Code Connect where available, marks gaps, routes marketing page work correctly, and avoids claiming full coverage.
